} gameState.gamePhase = GAME_PHASES.START; gameState.entities = []; gameState.player = null; p.logs.game_info.push({ data: { gamePhase: GAME_PHASES.START }, framecount: p.frameCount, timestamp: Date.now() }); } // Expose globally window.gameInstance = gameInstance; // Control mode setter window.setControlMode = function(mode) { gameState.controlMode = mode; // Update button states document.querySelectorAll('.control-button').forEach(btn => { btn.classList.remove('active'); }); const btnId = mode.toLowerCase() + 'ModeBtn'; const btn = document.getElementById(btnId); if (btn) { btn.classList.add('active'); } }; Sonic Rush

SONIC RUSH

Race through colorful zones as Sonic the Hedgehog! Collect golden rings for protection and points, defeat enemies by jumping on them, and navigate through loops and platforms. Reach the goal post at the end of each act to progress. Lose all your rings when hit by an enemy, and lose a life if you're hit without rings. Collect 100 rings for an extra life. Complete all acts and defeat Dr. Eggman to win!

Arrow Left/A: Move left | Arrow Right/D: Move right | Space/W: Jump (press again in air for spin dash attack) | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart (from game over screen)

TEST_3.strategy_description: Move right until encountering an enemy, then deliberately collide with it while having rings. Observe ring loss and invincibility period. Then attempt to get hit again without rings to test life loss mechanics.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: First hit should scatter all rings and make Sonic invincible briefly. Second hit without rings should reduce lives. Test is successful when damage system works correctly and invincibility frames prevent immediate consecutive damage.
